title: Write non-hermetic e2e landing tests + a11y spec + selectors module
acceptance_criteria: selectors.ts exports the four data-testid constants used by tests (single source of truth, DRY)

@critical 'landing renders': goto '/en'; assert hero heading, hero-url-input, hero-scan-submit, nav, footer visible; assert NO console errors and NO pageerror events captured on the landing page BEFORE any submit

@critical 'critical path (real scan)': fill hero-url-input with 'https://example.com'; set up page.waitForRequest('**/api/v1/scans') BEFORE submit; submit via hero-scan-submit; assert captured request method POST and request.postDataJSON() toMatchObject { url: 'https://example.com' }; assert page.waitForURL(/\/en\/scan\/[^/?]+/). NO assertions on the destination page. NO page.route mocking anywhere.
@functional 'empty input defaults to example.com': clear input, observe POST body toMatchObject { url: 'example.com' }, assert URL transition
@functional 'final CTA pricing link': click final-cta-pricing, assert URL is /en/pricing
@functional '/ redirects to /en': goto '/', assert final URL is /en
@functional axe (landing.a11y.spec.ts): run @axe-core/playwright AxeBuilder on '/en'; assert zero violations with impact 'serious' or 'critical' (minor/moderate allowed)
@non-blocker: weekly counter shows a parseable integer (real /api/v1/stats/scan-count); FAQ first item open by default
Every test title contains exactly one of the tags @critical / @functional / @non-blocker so the Automation Gate can classify
Tests use only existing semantic selectors + the T-03 data-testids; no brittle CSS-class selectors
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
